techtribedev.title: InterBase
techtribedev.description: A fully responsive app made in tailwind. The App is fully responsive for mobile devices , tablets ,laptops and desktops pc's. The app is based upon a figma design and is pixel perfect.

techtribedev.title: Todo-List Mern
techtribedev.description: A fully responsive todo-list made in mern with jwt authtication and holds full CURD operations like create, update, delete, checked and holds filter, sort and search capabilities and a very unique glass morphism design.

techtribedev.title: Shopify Profit Tracker
techtribedev.description: This project takes api from the shopify store and calculates and display the data of products, orders and statistics. The app is trail based and lockes some featuers if you are not subscribed and the app checkout is connected to paypal and the app is very feature rich.

react.title: Frozen - Ecommerce APP
react.description: A React-based ecommerce application with modern UI and shopping cart functionality.

react.title: StopWatch / TodoList
react.description: A stopwatch with the ability of start stop rest time and a simple todolist that holds curd operations.

javascript.title: Beans Ecommerce APP
javascript.description: Coffee App build with HTML CSS JavaScript with cart functionality and add to cart features

javascript.title: Shoe Ecommerce APP
javascript.description: Shoe App build with HTML CSS JavaScript with Add To Cart functionality php mail for mailing and much more.

htmlCss.title: CookBook Landing Page
htmlCss.description: Responsive Landing page created in HTML and BootStrap

htmlCss.title: LogIN Page
htmlCss.description: Attractive login and signup page created in HTML and CSS
